insights: Contains embedded self-tests validating zam candidate path discovery and QEMU command construction
Includes list of 4 fallback paths for zam.elf binary location lookup
Test assertion syntax requires parenthesized boolean expressions in Nushell
Release build path is prioritized as first candidate in search order

patterns_discovered.pattern: Nushell assertion syntax requires full parenthesization
patterns_discovered.description: Assertions with comparison operators must wrap the entire condition in parentheses: assert ((expr) == value) not assert (expr) == value
qemu.nu defines ordered list of candidate paths for zam executable, checking release build first then debug locations
Adapter scripts include run_tests function for smoke testing before dispatch execution

gotchas_discovered.gotcha: Nushell parenthesization rules differ from bash/zsh
gotchas_discovered.context: assert command requires double-wrapped parentheses for comparisons
gotchas_discovered.impact: Tests silently fail without syntax correction
gotchas_discovered.prevention: Implement Nu-specific linting for assertion syntax

gotchas_discovered.gotcha: Smoke test expects graceful failure with temp card dir
gotchas_discovered.context: Test validates error handling when adapter runs with incomplete card structure
gotchas_discovered.impact: Critical for verifying adapter robustness before QEMU dispatch
gotchas_discovered.prevention: Document expected failure modes in adapter comments

approach_outcome.summary: Fixed Nushell assertion syntax by wrapping comparison expressions in parentheses; smoke test now passes
approach_outcome.changes_required: Minimal - syntax correction only, no logic changes
approach_outcome.next_phase: Adapter ready for dispatch integration testing

recommendations.recommendation: Add Nu syntax validation to pre-commit hooks for all *.nu files
recommendations.rationale: Prevents similar parenthesization issues in future assertion code

recommendations.recommendation: Document zam candidate search order and fallback strategy in adapter comments
recommendations.rationale: Clarifies why release build is prioritized and helps with debugging binary lookup failures

recommendations.recommendation: Expand smoke test coverage to include invalid card structures and missing 9P mount
recommendations.rationale: Validates graceful failure handling across multiple failure modes before QEMU integration

recommendations.recommendation: Create Nu-specific coding guidelines document for assertion and comparison syntax
recommendations.rationale: Standardizes syntax across all Nushell scripts in bop ecosystem (adapters, scripts, vibekanban)
